cursorDirectoryMetadata.name: 1Shot API
cursorDirectoryMetadata.description: 1Shot API is a high-throughput transaction relayer service for EVM blockchain networks. It provides extensive tooling for facilitating agentic payments and web3 product development. 1Shot API's mcp server exposes tools to AI-coding environments like Cursor to produce fully-functional onchain agents and products that interact with smart contracts with minimal prompting.
